description: Mass-Decorrelated ParticleNet training configuration with DisCo loss

training_parameters.comment: DisCo loss for mass decorrelation. train_folds for training, valid_folds for early stopping, test_folds for final evaluation. augment_phi_rotation: apply random phi rotation to Px,Py during training.

disco_parameters.comment: disco_lambda: weight for mass decorrelation (DisCo(score, mass1) + DisCo(score, mass2))

model_config.comment: Node features: [E, Px, Py, Pz, charge, isMuon, isElectron, isJet, isBjet] (9 features)

optimization_config.comment: Valid optimizers: Adam, RMSprop, Adadelta. Valid schedulers: StepLR, ExponentialLR, CyclicLR, ReduceLROnPlateau

background_config.comment: mode: 'groups' for physics-motivated grouping, 'individual' for each background as separate class.

dataset_config.comment: B-jets are separate particles (no btagScore). Dataset includes mass1, mass2 for decorrelation.

system_config.comment: device: 'cpu', 'cuda', or 'cuda:X' for specific GPU. pilot=true uses small test datasets.
